name: config_doc
description: Generate config reference doc and validation script
task_prompt:
You are working in the archolith-context repository.

Complete the following two tasks in order:

TASK 1 — Config Reference Doc
Read archolith_proxy/config.py in full. Create docs/config_reference.md containing
a markdown table with one row per setting. Columns: Setting Name, Type, Default,
Description. Include every field defined in the Settings class. The file must have
at least 40 lines.

TASK 2 — Config Validator Script
Create scripts/validate_config.py. It must:
- Read a .env file path from argv[1] (default: ".env")
- Check that UPSTREAM_API_KEY, UPSTREAM_BASE_URL, EXTRACTOR_API_KEY,
  EXTRACTOR_BASE_URL, and UPSTREAM_MAX_RETRIES are all set and non-empty
- Print a PASS/FAIL line for each, then a final summary line
- Exit 0 if all pass, 1 if any fail

Do not modify any existing files. Create only docs/config_reference.md and
scripts/validate_config.py.

checkpoints.description: Config reference markdown exists with all settings
Validation script exists and imports correctly
